title: Floravive
description: Want more from your vanilla generation? This mod is for you!
body:
Floravive, A New Minecraft Exploration Experience!

What does this add to my world, and why should I download it?

Floravive transforms your world with lush biomes, unique discoveries, and a fresh sense of adventure. Explore like never before!

What Biomes does this add?

Floravive adds 53 new and vinilla-like biomes, and also redoes some base game ones. Some examples are Oasis - A lush break inside of desert biomes Forest - Forests now are a lot more fun to walk through with new trees and other vegitation

Dependencies

None — no mods needed!

Credits

Author: Hotsu0p
Support: Discord (hotsuop)

Reporting Issues + Collaboration

- Recruitment: Seeking datapack devs/builders—DM hotsuop

Enjoy your Floravive adventure!
